refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation link availability at or above the customer-defined target over the agreed evaluation period.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR to explicitly state the performance metric (link availability) and the evaluation period clarifies the requirement for design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure link uptime and downtime over the evaluation period using telemetry data to verify availability meets or exceeds the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and report link failures promptly.
FR3: Recover or switch to backup links to maintain availability.
FR4: Provide real-time link status updates to operators and system managers.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.
DP2: Use real-time link health monitoring and alerting system.
DP3: Integrate link status telemetry with operator interfaces.
DP4: Employ adaptive bandwidth management to optimize link usage.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement redundant network links with automatic failover.

potential_sources: Link monitoring tightly coupled with failover logic
Operator interface dependency on telemetry data
coupling_check.notes: The selected DP logically supports the FR with manageable coupling; failover and monitoring are closely related but can be modularized.

assumptions_risks: Assumes redundant network infrastructure is available and reliable.
Risk of failover delay impacting availability if not optimized.
Assumes telemetry data is accurate and timely.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding explicit DP for telemetry integration to reduce coupling and improve modularity.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Responsible for managing teleoperation link infrastructure, including redundancy and failover mechanisms.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Provides real-time link status and health data to other modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connections managed for redundancy and failover.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives teleoperation commands contingent on link availability.

module_containment_scores.notes: Broad scope but less focused on teleoperation link specifics.
Limited containment; vehicle module depends on link but does not manage it.
Highest containment score; primary owner of teleoperation link availability.
Monitors safety alerts but not responsible for link management.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Teleoperation module is best suited to contain the DP for link availability due to its direct control over network redundancy and failover.
containment_risks: Potential diffusion if telemetry data is duplicated across modules.
Risk of interface complexity if failover logic is tightly coupled with operator tasking.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and centralize telemetry data handling within Teleoperation to minimize diffusion.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (redundant network links with failover) directly addresses the refined FR and supports the availability target.

diffusion_risks: Interface complexity between Teleoperation and Vehicle modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows strong containment for the DP with manageable diffusion risks.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry and link status monitoring is feasible within the Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility to Teleoperation module for link availability.

recommended_revisions: Add explicit DP for telemetry integration to reduce coupling.
Clarify interface definitions to minimize diffusion risks.

decision.justification: While the decomposition is sound, adding a DP for telemetry integration and refining interface definitions will improve modularity and reduce diffusion risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor teleoperation link status continuously.
FR2: Detect and report link failures promptly.
FR3: Recover or switch to backup links to maintain availability.
FR4: Provide real-time link status updates to operators and system managers.

revise.why: To explicitly include telemetry integration as a separate DP to improve modularity and reduce coupling.

assumptions: Telemetry data is accurate and timely.
evidence_needed: Telemetry data accuracy and latency measurements.
